../docs/多端数据同步源码分析.md.note: fileManager.js 已按 SHA-256 内容哈希存储附件，与需求文档高度吻合。后端 attachments.storage_path 可直接复用 internalFileName 模式（{hash}.ext）。但 extractedText/imageFrames 可能很大（PDF 转 Base64），建议第一版就拆表存储而非塞在 raw_json 中。
群聊 groupchat.js 有 20+ 处 fs.writeJson 写入 history.json，远多于需求文档所述。同步事件生成不能只拦截 save-chat-history IPC，必须统一处理群聊写入点。建议方案：统一写入函数 + Watcher 兜底。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: 已修订文档：确认 VCPToolBox service 插件已有 `hasApiRoutes + registerApiRoutes` 命名空间挂载能力，`VChatSyncCenter` 可直接挂到 `/api/plugins/VChatSyncCenter/*`，不需要新增宿主 API 挂载机制；同时补充说明 `registerApiRoutes` 收到的是 WebSocketServer 模块对象引用，而主 WebSocketServer 的底层 initialize 在 app.listen 回调中执行，路由注册阶段不能默认其已完成初始化。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: 已按 VCPToolBox 当前源码确认：Plugin.js 存在 initializeServices(app, adminApiRouter, projectBasePath)，会在 manifest.hasApiRoutes && module.registerApiRoutes 时挂载到 /api/plugins/{name}，也兼容 registerRoutes(app, adminApiRouter, pluginConfig, projectBasePath) 或 registerRoutes(app, pluginConfig, projectBasePath)。server.js 在 loadPlugins 后 setWebSocketServer 并调用 initializeServices。因此 VChatSyncCenter 可按 hasApiRoutes + registerApiRoutes 落地，无需新增宿主挂载机制；但 WebSocketServer.initialize 在 app.listen 回调内发生，registerApiRoutes 收到的是模块对象引用而非已 initialized 的 WS 实例。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: v4.5 已补充关键落地约束：DeepMemo mtime 排除最新 topic 验收风险、watcher size/mtime 稳定读取与 JSON parse retry、初次接入 mode 前置状态机、附件 _fileManagerData 投影兼容、中心剥离派生内容但桌面可恢复、/operations 单一写入口优先、同步投影写回原子化边界。后续实现不要倒退为 history.json 文件同步或单 msg_id 主键。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md.note: v1.1 已按评估报告补齐关键实现约束：完整 DDL/索引/外键策略、server_seq 规则、VCHAT_SYNC_WS_ENABLED、配置 DTO 示例、batch 子事件幂等预留、Adapter 接口兼容、群聊专项语义、remoteGateway 覆盖、投影聚合算法、local_order null 排序、memo/forum 策略、normalized_id 预扫描、M6 写点收口占位。后续实现不要退回 v1.0 的简略表结构或遗漏这些安全边界。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md.note: 已按需求文档 v4.6、技术实现文档 v1.1、评估报告与代码事实拆分为 Cycle 0-7：中心骨架、中心 operation、桌面 Adapter、投影闭环、附件配置、bootstrap、测试发布、写点收口增强。后续实施应按这些周期文档推进，避免跳过 message-level/复合身份/atomicWriter/DTO 白名单等安全边界。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md.note: 已核对周期评估报告：核心结论基本正确，但 Cycle 2 的 VCPChat registerRoutes 签名被评估报告误判为支持 3/4 参数，源码实际只传 registerRoutes(app, pluginConfig, projectBasePath)；remoteGateway 实际直接写 AppData 范围不小，应覆盖 history/config/forum/memo/settings/文件操作；Cycle 4 需补附件扁平目录兼容，Cycle 2 需补 better-sqlite3/Electron rebuild 或改用纯 JS SQLite。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md.note: 已按源码核对修订周期文档：评估报告修正 VCPChat registerRoutes 仅三参数、remoteGateway 写 AppData 范围；Cycle 0 补 schema_migrations/version/checksum/事务/备份策略；Cycle 2 补 better-sqlite3/Electron rebuild 风险、2a/2b 里程碑、remoteGateway 覆盖、流式中间态过滤、localIndex/state/offline_queue 恢复；Cycle 4 补桌面附件扁平目录 AppData/UserData/attachments/{hash}{ext} 兼容。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 5 schema uses migration v4 for bootstrap_sessions and messages.local_order. Earlier migrations v1-v3 are checksum-gated and must not be edited; future bootstrap schema changes need new migration versions.

Cycle 4 schema changes are migration v3 only. Do not edit already-applied migration v1/v2 SQL because checksum gating will refuse startup; future schema changes must be appended as new migration versions.

Cycle 1 adds migration v2 for messages.raw_json/checksum/server_seq/deleted_at and tombstones.retain_until. Because migration checksums are immutable, never edit successful migration v1 SQL; add new versions for schema changes.

Cycle 0 migration uses schema_migrations checksum gating and must refuse startup if an already-successful migration checksum changes. change_log/tombstones/conflicts intentionally avoid strong business-entity FKs; messages PK is (item_type,item_id,topic_id,id), topics PK is (item_id,item_type,id).

VChatSyncCenter 鉴权统一只使用 VCHAT_SYNC_KEY：普通同步 API 与 bootstrap import/export 都复用 validateSyncAuth；支持 Authorization: Bearer <VCHAT_SYNC_KEY> 或 x-vchat-sync-key，不再支持 VCHAT_BOOTSTRAP_KEY/bootstrapKey/x-vchat-bootstrap-key。未配置 VCHAT_SYNC_KEY、VCHAT_SYNC_KEY=change-me 或 token 不匹配统一返回 401；插件未启用仍返回 404。

Query-string sync_key authentication was removed after review to avoid leaking secrets via URLs/logs. Keep auth to Authorization: Bearer or x-vchat-sync-key unless explicitly re-approved for dev-only use.
VChatSyncCenter /status is gated by VCHAT_SYNC_ENABLED and VCHAT_SYNC_KEY. Default false/change-me must not grant access; logs must not expose token/key values.
同步修复：message update 目标不存在时抛出的错误带 code=MESSAGE_UPDATE_TARGET_MISSING；routes/operations 会返回结构化 code，Adapter offlineQueue 优先按 code 触发 recreate-on-rescan 修复，保留旧错误文案匹配作为兼容。

Cycle 4 requires center message raw_json/change_log payloads to use sanitized messages only: extractedText/imageFrames/thumbnail-like large derivative fields are stripped and summarized in _syncDerivatives/derivatives. Do not reintroduce raw large file-manager fields into message payloads.

Cycle 1 intentionally does not create attachment placeholders. message attachments are only inserted into message_attachments when attachments(hash) already exists; missing hashes remain in change_log.payload.attachment_refs.skipped so Cycle 4 can upload/link them without blocking message operations.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: VCPDistributedServer PluginManager expects configSchema values to be plain strings like "boolean"/"integer"/"string". Do not use VCPToolBox object-style {type, default} here unless PluginManager is upgraded, or service config parsing will break.

Cycle 2 safety gate: only mode=active may enqueue or submit operations. uninitialized/recovering must observe without advancing localIndex, otherwise initial changes can be swallowed or corrupt-index recovery can upload duplicate creates.
同步修复：带 payload.cascaded_from 的 delete 事件现在在 Adapter projector 中按已由父删除覆盖的级联事件处理，直接计入 skipped 并推进 seq，避免父级 topic/item/topic_history 删除已完成后，级联子 delete 冗余投影或阻塞 pull cursor。

Topic sync design discussion: runtime config events should no longer be the authoritative source for config.topics[]. Bootstrap may carry full topics[] for initialization, but runtime topic content should use topic upsert/delete events and ordering should use dedicated topic_order move/replace events. Adapter must still project to original VChat paths Agents/<id>/config.json or AgentGroups/<id>/config.json and preserve unknown topic fields; current TOPIC_ALLOWED/topicMetaFromEvent paths may need adjustment to avoid clipping extension fields.
Cycle 4 实现后，config/attachment events 不再是 blocking unsupported：config 必须经 configProjector 写安全 DTO，attachment 事件至少记录元数据；不要重新把它们加入 unsupported，否则 pullLoop 会卡住 Cycle 4 同步。

Cycle 3 projector intentionally treats config/attachment/unknown events as blocking unsupported until their real projectors are implemented. Do not add them to appliedSeqs without writing AppData, or pullLoop may advance last_applied_seq and permanently skip events.

Cycle 3 projector writes AppData history.json via atomicWriter and records writeIntentLock before writing. Watcher must keep checksum-aware lock handling; otherwise synced remote changes will loop back into offlineQueue.

Cycle 4 config projector now MUST merge safe_projection_json into existing local config: delete schema-managed sync keys, apply remote DTO keys, and preserve local non-sync fields. Do not revert to full DTO overwrite or naive shallow merge.
2026-06-08 recordBootstrapPrimaryBaseline 写 theme_asset localIndex 时改为 uploaded:false、binary_uploaded:false、metadata_baseline:true、bootstrap_baseline:true，避免 bootstrap metadata-only 资产被长期误判为二进制已上传。
bootstrapPrimary 在 importBootstrap 成功后必须先 recordBootstrapPrimaryBaseline 写入 messages/configs localIndex，再切 active 并 scanAppData；否则 bootstrap 基线会被 active scan 误判为本地新变更并入队 /operations。

bootstrapPrimary 必须先调用 centerClient.importBootstrap 导入中心基线，再上传本地附件文件；不要在 /bootstrap/import 前调用 uploadLocalAttachment，否则附件上传会写 attachments/change_log，使中心不再为空并触发 `center is not empty; bootstrap_primary refused`。
bootstrapPrimary/joinExisting 备份 AppData 时必须写到 AppData 同级的 `${basename(AppData)}_sync_backups`，不要放回 AppData/sync/backups，否则 fs-extra 会拒绝把 AppData 复制到自身子目录并导致 bootstrap 失败。

Cycle 5 修复后：join_existing 的 baseline events 只使用连续本地 baseline_seq，state.last_applied_seq 仍只取中心 latest_seq，禁止再用 100000/200000 伪 seq 污染游标；merge_existing 必须输出 local_only/center_only/checksum_mismatch diff。

Cycle 5 bootstrap flow backs up AppData before bootstrap_primary/join_existing, scans normalized-id conflicts before import, writes missing history message ids with stable sync_ SHA-based ids through atomicWriter, and keeps merge_existing as report-only by default.

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 5 修复后：bootstrap import 会记录 bootstrap_sessions started/completed/failed；export 支持 kind/cursor/limit 分页元数据；messages 导出必须按 local_order/server_seq/id 排序，避免历史顺序丢失。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 2026-06-08 修复主题同步补传未触发：index.js 之前用 projectBasePath 拼 styles/themes 和 assets/wallpaper；插件宿主传入的 projectBasePath 实际可能是 VCPDistributedServer，导致扫描到 0 个主题包。现统一用 path.resolve(config.appDataPath, '..') 得到 VChat 根目录，再拼 styles/themes 与 assets/wallpaper。验证 scanThemePackages 可发现 16 个主题包、22 个资产。
VChatSyncAdapter 现在支持插件目录独立 config.env，且优先级为插件 config.env > 宿主 pluginConfig > 内建默认值；后续不要反向改回仅依赖宿主注入。
Cycle 6 后 requireAdapterAuth 已作为真实鉴权 helper 导出，status/bootstrap/manifest/conflicts 路由和 smoke 测试必须复用该函数；不要在测试中复制一份本地鉴权逻辑以免偏离真实行为。

VChatSyncAdapter 本地 status/bootstrap/manifest/conflicts API 统一只使用 VCHAT_SYNC_KEY 鉴权；支持 Authorization: Bearer <VCHAT_SYNC_KEY> 或 x-vchat-sync-key，不再接受 x-vchat-bootstrap-key。未配置 VCHAT_SYNC_KEY、VCHAT_SYNC_KEY=change-me 或 token 不匹配都必须拒绝并返回 401。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 6 起中心 SQLite 备份必须用 better-sqlite3 .backup() 且先 wal_checkpoint(FULL)，备份后用独立只读 DB integrity_check + latest_seq 验证；禁止仅复制 .db 文件作为 WAL 模式备份。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: Cycle 6 状态页依赖 pullLoop.stats() 暴露 last_duration_ms/last_applied/total_events_applied，用于验证 WS 丢包后 REST 补拉与启动同步性能；不要移除这些轻量指标。

../VCPToolBox/WebSocketServer.js.note: VChatSync latest_seq WebSocket (/vchat-sync/latest-seq) 必须通过 registerVChatSyncAuthValidator 注册的校验器验证 Authorization Bearer/x-vchat-sync-key；禁止恢复为无条件接收，否则会泄露同步 latest_seq 通知。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: 配置 DTO checksum 标准为 sha256(stableJsonStringify({dto_version,schema,entity_id,safe_projection_json}))；Center 是最终校验边界，Adapter/bootstrap/projector 必须保持同一语义，不能退回只 hash safe_projection_json。

Center configService is the final security boundary: config safe_projection_json must pass schema whitelist validation plus sensitive-key scan before checksum/write/change_log. Do not rely only on desktop safeConfigDto.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: ensureLocalAttachment() must resolve local attachment filenames using the best available extension metadata: existing remote_attachment:<hash> localIndex ext before download, then X-VChat-Attachment-Ext response header after download. Header ext is sanitized and used for final hash+ext filename so messages with missing ref.ext still rewrite to usable files.

Attachment upload keeps small files as base64 JSON but switches files larger than config.multipartAttachmentThresholdBytes (default 8 MiB) to multipart via centerClient buffer upload. Lazy download/pending_attachment remains intentional.

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: ensureItem/ensureTopic callers may pass null metadata during bootstrap imports because VChat history manifest messages often lack item/topic metadata. Always normalize null/non-object metadata to {} before reading title/summary.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 消息同步当前遵循“尽量整条消息透传”语义：diff/buildOperation 发送 payload.message 的完整消息对象，projector 只删除同步内部字段 item_type/item_id/topic_id/local_order/server_seq/server_version/_syncDerivatives/sync_status 后写回 history.json。临时/占位/流式消息会在 diff 阶段被过滤，因此不能宣称‘所有字段/所有消息状态都同步’。
history.json 投影必须保持原生消息结构：不要写入 item_type/item_id/topic_id/local_order/server_seq/server_version/_syncDerivatives/sync_status 等同步内部字段；同步版本/seq/checksum 仅写 localIndex。
message.delete base_version now follows the same confirmed-remote rule as update: only non-null/non-undefined last_known_server_version is treated as confirmed remote existence.
applyLocalSnapshot now merges the previous local_index row before refreshing checksum/pending fields so server-version and repair metadata survive local rescans until projector/queue updates them.

For message sync repair, localIndex existence alone must not be treated as proof of remote existence; create-vs-update decisions should consider last_known_server_version / projector evidence or self-heal on 400 target-missing.

message rows can exist in local_index without any center message/change_log row because applyLocalSnapshot writes them immediately after enqueueMany; if the queue later retains only an update or a create is lost, diffHistory will emit update forever and center rejects with `message update target does not exist`.

P1 repair implemented: when a message.update submit fails with `message update target does not exist` (including axios response.data.error/message), the queue drops that update row, clears pending fields, sets last_known_server_version=null and pending_status=`needs_create` so next local scan recreates the message instead of retrying update forever.

Current queue worker keeps retrying 400 rejects forever and markSubmitted clears pending flags without preserving pending_action. A permanent `message update target does not exist` reject leaves local_index with pending=null so future scans keep generating update instead of recreating missing message.

Smoke test covers both P0 diff behavior (local_index row without confirmed remote server version emits create) and P1 2B self-heal (missing update target rolls back remote-existence assumption and removes the bad update row).

settings.json runtime 同步规则：默认只同步 userName 和 userAvatarUrl；但 sync_profile runtimeSync.settings.include 可以扩展 runtime 字段，扩展范围必须限制在 SETTINGS_BOOTSTRAP_ALLOWED 初始化字段内。不要把 runtimeConfigurableAllowed 改成仅默认字段。

当前代码实际可同步的配置范围以 configSchema/pathRules 为准：Agent config、Agent regex_rules.json（按 agent_config 白名单处理）、Group config、settings.json、forum.config.json；memo.config.json 虽被 watcher/scanner 识别为配置路径，但 schemaForPath 返回 unsupported_config，因此当前实现不会真正入队或投影同步。

当前同步扫描范围不包含 DesktopWidgets、systemPromptPresets、DesktopData：pathRules 只识别 history.json、Agents/*/(config|regex_rules).json、AgentGroups/*/config.json、UserData/(memo|forum).config.json、settings.json，以及头像/attachments/fileManager 类文件。文档 5.4.1 也强调未列入白名单的字段/路径默认不同步。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.note: 收敛版开发文档已修订：Topic 明确升级为一等实时同步实体，不再作为 Agent/Group config DTO 的 topics 字段夹带同步；本地仍通过 config.json.topics 兼容 UI。实施要求新增 topicDiffEngine/topicProjector，Center 扩展 topicService/topics 表/change_log，ensureTopic 只作为消息乱序或旧客户端兜底。topic.delete 第一版为软删除/隐藏入口，不级联删除 history/message。附件策略明确为第一版消息投影时自动下载优先，失败 pending/可重试。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.note: 已新增一份按新策略收敛的开发文档：日常实时同步聚焦 Agent/Group 基础列表、Topic、正式消息、附件、必要头像；Agent 详细设置、UI 偏好、forum 非敏感设置仅在首次接入时同步一次，后续默认不参与 watcher 实时同步。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md.note: 已修订评估报告：Topic 不再建议临时放入 AGENT_REALTIME_ALLOWED，而明确升级为一等实时同步实体；本地仍兼容 config.json.topics，但协议层新增 topic.create/update/delete、topicDiffEngine/topicProjector/Center topicService。topic.delete 第一版建议软删除/隐藏入口，不级联删除 history/message。附件下载策略也修正为“metadata event 只记录元数据；带附件消息投影时当前代码会尝试即时下载并重写本机路径”。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 2026-06-01 修复头像不同端不同步：watcher 调用 handleFile 时必须把 centerClient 和 config 传入 context；diffAttachment 只有在 mode=active 且 context.centerClient 存在时才会调用 uploadLocalAttachment 并提交 avatar operation。启动 scanAppData 也需要传 config，否则附件/头像本地路径依赖可能退回默认。
2026-05-14 排查：Adapter 状态路由在 5974 正常，pull loop 活跃，但 state/local_index 最后更新停在 09:27；若此后有 AppData/UserData history.json 更新而 sync 状态不变，优先怀疑 chokidar watcher 事件未触发或监听进程未看到实际写入路径。

modules/ipc/NativeFsService.js.note: 2026-05-28 Windows hidden/system directory filtering: _isHiddenName now treats dotfiles plus common Windows system folders ($RECYCLE.BIN, System Volume Information, Recovery, Config.Msi) as hidden when showHidden is false, so drive-root mounts such as F:\ no longer show $RECYCLE.BIN by default while showHidden:true can still reveal them. node --check passed.

NativeFileMount Agent follow-up 2026-05-20: Agent copy now uses dedicated copyTo instead of globalClipboard copy+paste; Agent trash is enforced server-side with payload.confirmed=true for source=agent, and widget trust mode requires an additional high-risk confirmation for trash/overwrite.

NativeFileMount v2.1 review 2026-05-20: implementation now includes main/preload/desktop/stream/DesktopRemote integration, allowlist authorization persistence, recent openWith validation, 5s fs timeouts for many metadata ops, stat concurrency=16, large-directory filesystem-order paging, cross-device cut/move confirmation, widget cleanup/unmount, and Agent Action Queue. Remaining review concerns: startDrag calls event.sender.startDrag from ipcMain.handle may be invalid depending Electron API; Agent copy currently uses global clipboard and can race/overwrite user clipboard across operations/cards; high-risk Agent trust semantics do not force separate confirmation for trash under trusted mode; streamManager DESKTOP_WIDGET timeout drops incomplete block without emitting placeholder/history cleanup for already swallowed content.

NativeFileMount follow-up implementation: added per-path allowlist authorization persistence with a three-button prompt, plus openWith recent-app persistence/validation using realpath + mtimeMs + size and a fallback picker. Recent-app entries are capped and stale entries are skipped instead of reused blindly.

NativeFileMount v2.1 follow-up fixes: registerMount now stores title from widget config; list() wraps key fs ops in a 5s timeout and builds entries with concurrency=16; frontend no longer truncates rendered loaded entries at 180, and Agent openWith requests are explicitly rejected with ERR_AGENT_OPENWITH_FORBIDDEN.

NativeFileMount review against v2.1: main/preload/desktop/stream/DesktopRemote integration exists and syntax-checks cleanly. Notable follow-ups: list() does sequential stat instead of documented concurrency=16/5s NAS timeout; allowlist/remember authorization and openWith recent app list are not implemented; listActiveMounts title falls back to label because registerMount does not persist title.

NativeFileMount large directories are paged by filesystem order after >3000 visible entries using a probe pass plus a page pass; normal directories still sort in memory. Cross-device cut/move now requires confirmedCrossDevice before allowing EXDEV copy+trash fallback.

NativeFileMount v1 uses main-process NativeFsService as the security boundary: mount registry holds rootRealPath/mode/ownerWidgetId/capabilityToken; low-risk list/watch APIs validate mountId+path, high-risk action/import/startDrag/unmount require ownerWidgetId+capabilityToken. Renderer/Agent must never receive capabilityToken except the NativeFileMount widget closure.

Desktopmodules/builtinWidgets/nativeFile.note: 2026-05-31 NativeFileMount instance getInfo() now exposes real customUI status: requested/mounted/fallbackToDefault/error plus versions. renderCustomUI() marks mounted only after the custom root is installed; render/runtime failure clears mounted, records error, and marks fallbackToDefault only when default UI is actually restored.

2026-05-28 scroll fix: NativeFileMount default UI now gives .nfm-main flex:1/min-height:0/display:flex/overflow:hidden and .nfm-side min-height:0/overflow:auto so .nfm-list can scroll within bounded height. NativeFileMount customUI now applies width/height 100%, minHeight 0, and overflow:auto fallback to the custom root after renderShadowWidget, preventing Agent-pushed custom cards from being clipped by the outer overflow:hidden desktop content container when custom UI omits its own scroll styles. node --check passed; npm run pack passed on retry with 360s timeout after one 240s timeout.

2026-05-28 doc-field completion: ui.confirm now maps messageColor/detailColor into CSS variables, applies variant via data-variant (glass/minimal styles), renders showAffectedCount when true, and passes affectedCount for trash/bulkTrash/overwrite/crossDeviceMove/agentHighRisk confirmations. node --check and npm run pack passed.

2026-05-27 review note: NativeFileMount already covers most of the doc scope: DESKTOP_BUILTIN parser -> streamManager -> contentPipeline/messageRenderer -> ipcBridge -> builtin mount spawn; default UI supports theme/layout/actions/icons/confirm; customUI v2 exposes list/open/reveal/copy/cut/paste/rename/trash/newFolder/move/copyTo/resolve/relative/onChange/onJobProgress/onAgentRequest; frame options are applied in widgetManager. Build verification passed (node --check + npm run pack). Remaining doc mismatches are mostly around completeness/strictness rather than missing plumbing.

2026-05-27 NativeFileMount doc-alignment continuation: actions now preserve object configs and render toolbar/context separator/spacer/icon/primary/danger; nfm.confirm returns action+accepted+confirmed and supports buttonOrder/icons/details/position; customUI trash can no longer bypass high-risk confirmation via options.confirmed; nfm.newFolder supports documented (parentRelativePath,name) with single-arg compatibility; nfm.resolve/nfm.relative added with Windows case-insensitive root comparison; agentUI preview/execution position/layout/showRiskSummary/showDetails/showProgress are reflected via data attributes/CSS. Parser now only comma-splits known array-like fields and requires explicit DESKTOP_BUILTIN type. Stream parse failures now output a safe placeholder without leaking original content.

2026-05-27 second NativeFileMount doc-alignment fix: default UI now consumes layout.showSize/showMtime/showHiddenBadge, toolbar/path/status bar top/bottom/hidden positions, and readonlyBehavior hide/disable for toolbar/context actions plus runtime guards. agentUI nested preview/execution fields are flattened during normalizeConfig and previewButtons/executionButtons are respected by default Agent dialogs. widgetManager contextmenu initialization TDZ risk was fixed separately. node --check for related renderer/widget/native-fs files and npm run pack passed; mojibake scan for modified widget/core files was clean.

2026-05-27 DESKTOP_BUILTIN NativeFileMount doc-alignment fix: parser now maps top-level theme./layout./actions./icons./agentUI. shorthand into config.ui.*, supports layout.variant/view aliases and ui.contextMenu; NativeFileMount normalizes layout.variant, flat ui.confirm fields into confirm.style CSS variables, agentUI preview/execution nested objects/buttons, expanded icons including ext overrides and category icon resolution; widgetManager prevents frame.showCloseButton=false plus contextMenu=false from producing a hard-to-close widget by keeping the desktop context menu enabled. node --check on parser/renderer/widget/native fs files and npm run pack passed; corruption scan for common mojibake markers was empty.

2026-05-27 review: reviewed DESKTOP_BUILTIN parser/stream/content pipeline, NativeFileMount grid/compact/ui.confirm/ui.agentUI, customUI v2 API, Agent high-risk confirmation, frame pass-through, and NativeFsService security boundary. node --check passed for NativeFileMount, parser/stream/content/message renderer, widgetManager, ipcBridge, NativeFsService, and NativeFsJobs; npm run pack completed successfully. Review found no blocking syntax/build issues, but noted manual end-to-end section 23 acceptance scenarios are still not evidenced in this review.

2026-05-27 full document completion pass: NativeFileMount now normalizes initialView/layout.view for list/grid/compact, treats initialView: compact as compact mode, implements default grid rendering with virtualized rows mapped to grid columns and configurable ui.layout.grid minItemWidth/itemHeight, adds CSS-variable driven ui.confirm.style and ui.agentUI.style visual customization, and makes Agent preview/execution text/buttons configurable via ui.agentUI while preserving nfm.onAgentRequest and high-risk nfmConfirm fallback. node --check and npm run pack passed after these changes.

2026-05-27 continuation validation: after expanding NativeFileMount customUI v2 nfm API and Agent hooks, node --check passed for nativeFileMountWidget.js, widgetManager.js, desktopBuiltinParser.js, streamManager.js, contentPipeline.js, and messageRenderer.js. npm run pack also completed successfully. Latest customUI API includes onJobProgress/onAgentRequest, high-risk overwrite/trash confirmation via nfmConfirm, and statusEl null guards for hidden status bar/custom UI layouts.

2026-05-27 DESKTOP_BUILTIN/nativeFileMount customization implementation: default NativeFileMount now normalizes config.ui theme/layout/actions/icons/confirm, renders toolbar/context menu from configured action lists, uses configurable icons and compact layout, exposes nfm.confirm(options) to customUI, and enforces high-risk confirmation types (trash/overwrite/crossDeviceMove/agentHighRisk) even when ui.confirm.enabled=false. Frame options are passed through widget.create via options.frame and widgetManager.applyFrameOptions handles outer card visuals/controls/overflow/contextMenu.

2026-05-27 NativeFileMount follow-up: implemented accepted paste conflict optimization and UX changes. Backend NativeFsService supports clipboardPreview as a readonly action, caches internal clipboard preview after copy/cut, builds preview from the currently effective internal/system clipboard, and _paste() fast-fails on the first ask-conflict before job creation. Frontend calls clipboardPreview quietly, predicts same-name conflicts from currently loaded entries and prompts immediately when possible, then still lets backend ask-conflict validation be authoritative. Toolbar paste button moved next to cut; row context menu includes “粘贴到当前文件夹” and it always pastes to currentDir/rootPath, not into the selected row. NativeFsJobs enriches failed job errors with operation/src/dest details and uses message before code; Windows EPERM during move/cut falls back to copy+trash like EXDEV. 2026-05-27 fix: same-folder copy+paste of the same file with conflict choice “重命名” previously failed because _paste() compared source with the initial requestedDest before _resolveConflict(); the guard now runs after _resolveConflict() and compares source with the final resolved dest, so autoRename can create “name (1).ext” while overwrite/self-final-dest is still rejected. 2026-05-27 UI fix: row context menu near the bottom of the NativeFileMount card is now measured after insertion and flipped upward/clamped inside the root bounds instead of using fixed 170x240 positioning, preventing the bottom part from being hidden by the card edge. Syntax checks passed for NativeFsJobs.js, NativeFsService.js, and nativeFileMountWidget.js.

2026-05-26 update 8: User confirmed update 7 was insufficient: mount-root paste still failed with a fleeting status, and Windows Explorer interop still failed; Explorer-to-widget showed ERR_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND. Follow-up fixes: nativeFileMountWidget.js now has sticky status handling (statusHoldUntil + setStatus(...,{force,holdMs})) so paste/action errors and failed job messages remain visible for ~15s and are not immediately overwritten by quiet refresh/job progress. NativeFsService.js replaced the failed Set-Clipboard/Get-Clipboard FileDropList attempt with STA PowerShell using System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard DataObject CF_HDROP/FileDrop plus Preferred DropEffect; _writeSystemFileClipboard writes FileDropList and copy/cut effect, _readSystemFileClipboard reads FileDrop and effect, and _existingClipboardPaths filters nonexistent/duplicate paths before returning system clipboard data so malformed Explorer clipboard data should not surface later as ERR_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND. Electron FileNameW remains only as a fallback. _openWith/_reveal structure was repaired after the clipboard edit. node --check passed for Desktopmodules/builtinWidgets/nativeFileMountWidget.js and modules/ipc/NativeFsService.js. Root paste exact backend error is not yet user-confirmed after sticky-status fix; the next repro should now show the real error if it still fails.

2026-05-26 update 6: User reported copy/cut/paste still not working and selected rows cannot be deselected by clicking blank area. Frontend fixes: added clearSelection() and blank-area pointerdown now focuses root, closes context menu, and clears selection unless Ctrl/Meta is held. Paste flow no longer opens askConflictStrategy dialog by default; toolbar paste and Ctrl+V call pasteToCurrentDir() with conflictStrategy=autoRename to avoid ERR_CONFLICT_NEEDS_CONFIRM making paste appear ineffective when same-name files exist. Backend clipboard path was reviewed: current code still uses Electron clipboard.writeBuffer/readBuffer FileNameW + Preferred DropEffect plus internal globalClipboard; if Explorer paste still fails, likely Electron clipboard does not expose CF_HDROP-compatible shell file clipboard through FileNameW alone and will need a native/PowerShell CF_HDROP implementation or a project-supported clipboard-event integration. node --check passed for nativeFileMountWidget.js and NativeFsService.js.

2026-05-26 update 5: Follow-up fixes after user reported selected CSS too strong, Enter/copy/cut/paste broken, Explorer paste unavailable, and right-click rename EPERM. Selected visual state is now CSS-owned again: syncSelectionStyles only toggles selected/data-selected/aria-selected and clears inline forced styles. handleKeydown now returns after handled shortcuts and adds Enter to open selected file or enter selected directory. NativeFsService copy/cut now also writes Windows file clipboard formats (FileNameW + Preferred DropEffect) so files can be pasted outside the widget; paste can also fall back to reading FileNameW from the system clipboard when internal globalClipboard is empty. Rename now handles Windows case-only renames through an intermediate temp name to avoid EPERM/same-path failures. node --check passed for nativeFileMountWidget.js and NativeFsService.js.

2026-05-26 update 4: Follow-up after user rejected context-menu target-path workaround and reported copy/paste still failed. Root causes found in default NativeFileMount UI: (1) loadDir() cleared selected on every non-append list reload, including same-directory quiet reloads from watcher/job/newFolder refresh, so selection vanished after refresh/re-render; (2) row pointerdown was bound to both root and listEl, causing duplicate handling/toggle risk for Ctrl/Meta selection; (3) toolbar had paste but no copy/cut buttons, and copy/cut could send an empty targetPaths array, setting backend globalClipboard to an empty selection. Fix: same-directory loadDir refresh now preserves path-based selection, pointerdown is bound only on root, selected helpers/ensureSelection guard empty copy/cut, toolbar copy/cut buttons were added, right-click action no longer depends on contextMenuTargetPath reselect workaround, and NativeFsService._copy rejects empty selections with ERR_EMPTY_SELECTION. node --check passed for nativeFileMountWidget.js and NativeFsService.js; npm run pack was attempted but timed out after 180s.

2026-05-26 fix: NativeFileMount customUI now exposes nfm.requestOperations(plan) via existing handleAgentAction confirmation flow, and nfm.list(relativePath,{limit,cursor,withMeta}) for paged large-directory reads while preserving legacy array return when withMeta is not true. CustomUI runtime failures call restoreDefaultUIAfterCustomFailure(); fallbackToDefault=false shows an error surface and keeps customUIActive true to avoid default UI list rendering against missing .nfm-list.

2026-05-25 implementation validation: NativeFileMount customUI/nfm API integration was completed and syntax-checked with node --check across streamManager.js, messageRenderer.js, contentPipeline.js, ipcBridge.js, nativeFileMountWidget.js, widgetRuntime.js, and NativeFsService.js. npm run pack completed successfully. CustomUI uses widgetRuntime.renderShadowWidget with controlled nfm API; no direct capabilityToken/desktopAPI exposure should be added.

NativeFileMount frontend now uses windowed virtual rendering for the directory list (scroll container + padded visible slice) instead of rendering every row. This keeps loaded data visible and preserves selection by original index while reducing DOM growth.

modules/renderer/streamManager.js.note: 2026-05-31 DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT parseDesktopWidgetEditBlock now supports both 「始」/「末」 and 「始ESCAPE」/「末ESCAPE」 for block and inline fields. ESCAPE blocks close only on 「末ESCAPE」 and throw an explicit unclosed-block error instead of silently consuming to EOF.

2026-05-29 DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT streaming support added: streamManager parses <<<[DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT]>>> blocks with repeated target/replace 「始」「末」 fields into payload.replacements[], dispatches through electronAPI.desktopPush({action:'editWidget'}), and filters edit tags from visible streaming output. ipcBridge handles desktopPush action editWidget by calling applyDesktopWidgetEdit().

2026-05-26 updated: DESKTOP_WIDGET parser chain now exists in modules/renderer/streamManager.js and modules/messageRenderer.js. It parses <<<[DESKTOP_WIDGET]>>> JSON for nativeFileMount and dispatches electronAPI.desktopPush({ action:'createBuiltinWidget', customUI }). Do not rely on the older 2026-05-24 conclusion that DESKTOP_WIDGET renders as plain chat text.

AppData/canvas/VCPDesktop_NativeFileMoun.note: 2026-05-25 revision after review report: corrected the CustomUI Shadow DOM plan to state that Desktop widgets already use Shadow DOM in Desktopmodules/core/widgetManager.js and NativeFileMount already exists in Desktopmodules/builtinWidgets/nativeFileMountWidget.js. Clarified that widgetRuntime.renderShadowWidget is a proposed new abstraction, not an existing API; implementation should extract/reuse widgetManager.js ShadowRoot/style/script/cleanup logic and treat customUI as semi-trusted, not iframe-grade isolation.

NativeFileMount CustomUI Shadow DOM plan saved. Key decision: support customUI.runtime='vcp-widget-shadow' to reuse normal VCP Widget Shadow DOM rendering, allowing Agent HTML/CSS/JS like ordinary cards while exposing only a controlled window.nfm API for file operations; no direct capabilityToken/desktopAPI/nativeFs exposure, write operations remain system-confirmed, fallback to default UI on failure.

modules/renderer/contentPipeline.js.note: 2026-05-25 review-fix validation: DESKTOP_WIDGET history placeholder wording was changed from “已创建” to request-sent wording, and transformDesktopPush() no longer depends on DESKTOP_PUSH regex availability before processing DESKTOP_WIDGET regexes. Full post-review syntax checks passed for streamManager/messageRenderer/contentPipeline/ipcBridge/nativeFileMountWidget/widgetRuntime/NativeFsService, and npm run pack succeeded.

Desktopmodules/runtime/widgetRuntime.js.note: 2026-05-28 customUI JS default-open change: buildSandboxCode no longer masks Function/eval/common constructors or Electron/Node-like globals and no longer applies prototype constructor lockdown. CustomUI scripts run with normal page JS capabilities by default, while nfm filesystem operations remain mediated by NativeFsService IPC/capabilityToken/high-risk confirmations. Runtime still injects a Shadow DOM-scoped document facade for convenient access to customUI elements and tracks timers/window/document listeners for cleanup.

2026-05-26 fix: widgetRuntime.renderShadowWidget now tracks window error/unhandledrejection listeners in runtimeErrorListeners and calls options.onRuntimeError(error,{runtimeId,widgetId,source}). Cleanup removes these listeners with other runtime resources. This improves CustomUI async error fallback but remains semi-trusted Shadow DOM isolation, not iframe-grade sandboxing.

../docs/VCPDesktop_NativeFileMoun/VCPDes.note: 已补充第 12 章“操作确认弹窗 ui.confirm 设计”：确认弹窗支持默认 UI/Agent 配置/customUI v2 自定义视觉，但 trash、overwrite、crossDeviceMove、agentHighRisk 等高危操作不能被 ui.confirm.enabled:false 或 customUI 绕过，仍必须进入统一 ConfirmResult 并由后端 capabilityToken、路径 allowlist、confirmed 等校验兜底。

../VCPMobile/src/core/stores/theme.ts.note: VCPMobile 同步主题资源库不会把桌面 CSS 当成可直接执行主题模块；前端使用 synced:<theme_id> 作为手动应用入口，从 vchat_sync_list_local_themes 读取已落盘 ThemePackage，注入 variables，并把已下载 asset 的 local_path 通过 convertFileSrc 重写为 --chat-wallpaper-dark/light。

主题同步方案调研：VCPMobile 当前主题是编译进包内的 TS 模块 import.meta.glob('../../assets/themes/*.ts')，壁纸来自 public/wallpaper/*.webp；桌面端是 styles/themes/*.css + assets/wallpaper 原图。Center/Adapter 当前只同步消息、配置白名单、附件/头像，未支持 styles/themes 或 wallpaper 目录。若未来实现主题同步，手机端不能直接加载任意桌面 CSS，建议同步结构化 ThemePackage（变量+extraCss+wallpaper hash）并下载壁纸到 app data，再由 theme store 合并动态主题。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: 修正 theme asset metadata-only 判定：未提供 storage_path 时必须默认 bootstrap-missing/<hash>，且 input.binary_available===false 也应强制 binary_available=false；否则 metadata-only 资产会被误判为二进制可用。
theme_assets.relative_path 表示客户端语义路径（如 assets/wallpaper/foo.png），不要用它判断二进制是否存在；binary_available 应基于 storage_path 是否为 bootstrap-missing/*。
/themes/assets 必须先用稳定 operation_id 调 getOperationResult 做幂等检查；Adapter 使用 theme_asset.${deviceId}.${themeId}.${assetHash}，重试不能重复 appendChange 触发 change_log.operation_id UNIQUE。

主题资源库协议定版：theme_package 支持 POST /operations 和 POST /themes，upsert action 在 change_log 中原样保留；theme_asset 是二进制资源，只通过 POST /themes/assets 上传，不进入 /operations。Bootstrap 只导入/导出 theme asset metadata，binary_available=false 时客户端必须从源 Center 按 /themes/assets/:hash 拉取二进制。

Center 主题资源库同步修复：themeService 会重新计算主题 checksum（覆盖 manifest/assets）并拒绝不匹配 checksum；theme asset 仅允许 jpeg/png/webp 且校验 magic/hash/大小/slot/asset_type/path containment。syncRoutes 的 POST /themes 走 processOperation 写 change_log 并通知 latest_seq，POST /themes/assets 返回并通知 theme_asset seq；bootstrapService 导出主题 assets metadata，二进制策略为 download_by_hash（客户端按 /themes/assets/:hash 拉取）。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 主题 theme_id 生成已改为中心兼容的 ASCII+SHA256短哈希策略：保留英文 slug 时为 <slug>-<16hex>，纯中文等非 ASCII 文件名为 theme-<16hex>；display_name 和 manifest.css.relative_path 仍保留原始中文文件名/路径，不修改 VChatSyncCenter。

Adapter 主题资源库同步基础能力：启动时扫描项目根 styles/themes/*.css，解析 CSS 变量与 --chat-wallpaper-dark/light url，按文件名生成 theme_id，通过 POST /themes 上传 theme_package，通过 POST /themes/assets 上传壁纸资产；监听 styles/themes 与 assets/wallpaper 变化后重新同步。注意桌面 CSS 中 '../assets/wallpaper/...' 会从项目根兜底解析为 assets/wallpaper/...。

preloads/shared/apiFactory.js.note: 2026-05-28 preload/security review: desktopAPI/chatAPI/utility APIs are materialized from fixed catalog keys and expose electronAPI as compatApi, not raw ops. createOps has generic invoke/send/subscribe internally, but exposeRoleApis only exposes roleApi and compatApi created from named catalog entries; no public desktopAPI/electronAPI arbitrary ipcRenderer.invoke(channel,...args) bridge found in main app preloads. Caveat: VCPHumanToolBox exposes electronAPI.invoke/send/on with allowlists, while VCPDistributedServer plugin GUI preloads expose unrestricted send/on in plugin-local windows, not VCPDesktop desktopAPI/electronAPI.

modules/ipc/desktopHandlers.js.note: 2026-05-28 custom high-risk confirmation: confirmHighRiskDesktopApi now tries a main-process-created custom BrowserWindow modal first (modules/high-risk-confirm.html + preloads/highRiskConfirm.js) with per-request random token IPC channels for payload/decision, contextIsolation/nodeIntegration:false/sandbox:true, default cancel semantics, and native dialog fallback on failure. Existing high-risk call sites remain unchanged; npm run pack and node --check passed.

2026-05-28 high-risk desktop API confirmation: desktop-get-credentials, desktop-shortcut-launch, and desktop-open-system-tool now require a main-process Electron dialog confirmation via confirmHighRiskDesktopApi before returning credentials, launching shortcuts/programs/URLs, or opening system tools/local paths. Denials return { success:false, error:'ERR_USER_DENIED_HIGH_RISK' }. node --check passed for desktopHandlers.js.

../VCPMobile/src-tauri/src/vcp_modules/v.note: 主题资源库同步修复：sanitize_id 必须拒绝 '.'/'..'；download_asset 必须校验已存在本地文件 SHA-256，不匹配则删除后重新下载；theme_asset change 导入后必须 merge_downloaded_asset 更新 DB 与 manifest；theme_package 删除需通过 state.theme_library_dir() 清理本地 theme_library/<theme_id> 文件。extra_css 信任边界按用户要求暂不收紧。

../docs/VCPDesktop_NativeFileMoun/VCPDes.note: 2026-05-29 update: architecture doc now includes three extra robustness recommendations: DesktopChanged/WidgetChanged event extension points as non-mandatory future push notifications, sourceVersion/layoutVersion/widgetVersion/desktopVersion with baseSourceVersion optimistic locking for DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT and ERR_SOURCE_VERSION_CONFLICT, and schemaVersion v1->v2 read-compatible/write-new lazy migration for legacy favorites with virtual package representation and ERR_PACKAGE_MIGRATION_FAILED.

2026-05-29 update: NativeFileMount reload section now requires reload-safe remove+spawn. The document explicitly blocks naive remove(widgetId)→spawn(widgetId) because widgetManager.remove() uses removingWidgetIds and delayed animation cleanup, which can block or accidentally delete the new widget. Reload must await cleanup, ensure state.widgets is cleared, skip or fully await removal animation, and keep widgetId stable externally while using a reloading lock.

2026-05-29 update: NativeFileMount canonical source is explicitly documented as normalized DESKTOP_BUILTIN syntax, not a new protocol. It must be parseable by existing parseDesktopBuiltinBlock, satisfy semantic parse->serialize->parse round-trip, use parser-supported fields (html/css/js/htmlContent/fallbackToDefault or supported customUI.*), keep stable field order, and exclude runtime fields such as mountId/capabilityToken.

2026-05-29 update: clarified htmlPackage multi-file edit granularity. QueryWidget source now states top-level source is mainFile content, files[] includes role/editable/encoding, targetFile is required for non-main files, targetReplace uniqueness is scoped to targetFile content, and base64 assets are not source-editable in first version.

2026-05-29 update: section 7.4 ordinary HTML multi-replacement example was aligned with section 7.2; it now uses repeated simplified target/replace blocks and states the system converts them to replacements[] internally. Verified no `replacements:` protocol field remains in the document.
2026-05-29 update: section 17.3 Agent multi replacement example now matches section 7.2 simplified repeated target/replace syntax and shows internal conversion to replacements[] in the system flow.

2026-05-29 update: DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT targetReplace input is now specified as repeated simplified target/replace blocks; the system parses repeated pairs in order and converts them internally to a replacements array. JSON replacements array is no longer required for first implementation, reducing Agent escaping/format risk.

2026-05-29 architecture doc created: defines unified VCPDesktop widget QueryDesktop/QueryWidget summary-editable-source levels, DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT replace + multi target/replace source editing, overall reload application model, full favorite package persistence for htmlWidget and nativeFileMount, and restart-safe restoration preserving style/interaction while regenerating NativeFileMount mountId/capabilityToken.

Desktopmodules/api/ipcBridge.js.note: 2026-05-31 DESKTOP_WIDGET create/edit now emit WidgetOperationResult receipts over desktop-operation-result using requestId. sendDesktopOperationResult() centralizes the envelope; createBuiltinWidget returns success/failure receipts and editWidget forwards applyDesktopWidgetEdit() outcomes. buildVersions() relies on local readNumber() and is safe in this file.

2026-05-30 htmlPackage minimal Query/Edit/Persist implemented: QueryWidget source lists package files/content from widgetData.cardFiles; EditWidget sourceFormat=htmlPackage now supports targetFile (defaults mainFile) with replace/targetReplace scoped to that file, rejects missing/non-editable/base64 files, updates cardPackage/cardFiles and re-renders mainFile edits. persist:ask sends package.json plus files[] to desktopSaveWidget. Syntax checks and npm run pack passed.

2026-05-29 persist:ask minimal v2 save path added for widget edits. ipcBridge now allows saved NativeFileMount desktopBuiltin edits to call desktopSaveWidget with package.json metadata and source.desktopbuiltin content; modules/ipc/desktopHandlers.js writes package.json and source.desktopbuiltin when provided. htmlPackage edit/persist remains explicitly unsupported until full file-level package editing is implemented.

2026-05-29 partial widget query/edit implementation: ipcBridge now builds QueryDesktop summaries with source metadata/version/layout, adds QueryWidget summary/editable/source, and adds basic EditWidget/DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT RPC handling for replace/targetReplace with baseSourceVersion conflict checks. NativeFileMount edit uses current desktop-side parseSource/spawn and delayed remove+respawn; streamManager DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT block parsing and favorite v2 persistence still need completion.

Desktopmodules/desktop-renderer.js.note: 已修复 QueryWidget level=editable 不应删除主 source 的问题：editable 级别要保留可编辑主源码，只省略/裁剪多文件内容正文；否则 DesktopRemote/EditWidget 前置查询无法拿到源码。相关命令链路还需要 DesktopRemote 插件脚本解析 QueryWidget/EditWidget，并由 modules/ipc/desktopRemoteHandlers.js 转发到桌面渲染端。

Desktopmodules/favorites/favoritesManage.note: 2026-05-30 legacy v1 compatibility: modules/ipc/desktopHandlers.js exposes old widget.html-only favorites through virtual schemaVersion 2 htmlPackage manifests with migration.fromSchemaVersion=1 and packageVirtual=true; load/list now return sourceOrigin/sourceCompleteness/migratedFromSchemaVersion/packageVirtual.

2026-05-30 favorite save normalization: regular HTML widgets are saved as schemaVersion 2 htmlPackage, even when no prior cardPackage exists. ensureHtmlPackageFiles creates/normalizes cardFiles main entry, sets sourceFormat=htmlPackage/sourceOrigin=stored/sourceCompleteness=full, and buildFavoritePackage always emits mainFile/entry/files metadata.

../VCPToolBox/TVStxt/DesktopCore.txt.note: 2026-05-30: Updated DesktopCore.txt agent instruction file to integrate the new VCPDesktop card Query, Edit (DESKTOP_WIDGET_EDIT), and Persist/Favorite architecture. The documentation was condensed to be extremely concise, highlighting the card type model, version control (optimistic lock with baseSourceVersion), multi-replacement parsing rules, and the updated DesktopRemote plugin command list.

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Topic protocol implementation: Center now accepts topic create/update/upsert as topic content upserts and topic_order move/replace as ordering operations. topics.metadata_json stores the full topic object to preserve extension fields; order is stored via topics.order_rank and emitted as topic_order change_log events.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: theme_asset baseline 可能只有 metadata 且 binary_available=false；Adapter 投影应记录 pending_binary/download_by_hash，不应阻塞 join_existing 或 pullLoop。
主题投影不能只写 AppData/theme_library；VChat 桌面客户端实际读取 styles/themes/*.css 和 assets/wallpaper/*，远端 theme_package/theme_asset 投影必须同时写回这些客户端消费路径。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: getOperationResult 现在返回 entity_id 和 payload，供幂等重试在业务行缺失等异常场景下有更多回退信息；保持既有 ok/seq/operation_id/idempotent/action/version 字段兼容。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: README 已补充主题同步 API 说明：Adapter 除附件与 bootstrap import/export 外，还支持 /themes 与 /themes/assets；主题包/资源落地后分别投影到 styles/themes/*.css 与 assets/wallpaper/*。

VChat 原生 agent topic 删除会从 config.topics 移除 topic，并删除 UserData/<agent>/topics/<topic> 目录；Adapter 的 topic.delete 投影应保持一致删除 topic 目录。topic_history.delete 仍只清空已存在的 history.json，不应新建缺失 history 文件，也不应删除 config.topics。

同步修复：attachment metadata event 到达后不仅记录 remote_attachment:<hash>，还会扫描 local_index 中已知 topic 的 history.json，调用 rewriteMessageAttachments() 对引用该 hash 的已投影消息做附件路径补修并写入 writeIntentLock，解决 message 先到、attachment 后到时本地路径不回填的问题。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: 同步修复：config delete 和级联 config delete change payload 现在补齐 relative_path。agent_config/group_config 的纯 entity_id 会映射到 Agents/<id>/config.json / AgentGroups/<id>/config.json；已有相对路径或 .json 路径保持不变。

../../VCPMobile/src-tauri/src/vcp_module.note: 移动端失败队列新增 center_sync_list_failed_operations，查询 vchat_sync_operations status='failed' 的 operation_id/entity_key/entity_type/action/retry_count/last_error/updated_at；前端 Sync 面板展示 failed 队列并复用 center_sync_retry_failed_operations 重试。

移动端新增低负载 SQLite reconciliation：runtime_loop 启动 reconcile_worker，每 600000ms 读取 vchat_sync_state.reconcile_last_message_rowid 后最多扫描 200 条 messages，单轮最多 enqueue 20 条、最多约 1000ms；仅当本地 operation 和 entity_index 都缺失时 enqueue_message_create，并推进 reconcile_last_message_rowid。

center_sync_repair_topic_messages 已接入 Center /messages/check：按 topic 扫本地 messages，先查本地 vchat_sync_operations/vchat_sync_entity_index，再按 500 分批调用只读 /messages/check；dryRun=false 仅对本地元数据缺失或 Center 缺失的消息调用 enqueue_message_create。

修复 Center join_existing baseline 主题壁纸缺失：build_baseline_events 现在在处理 baseline.themes/baseline.theme_packages 的 theme_package 事件后，会遍历 theme.assets[] 额外生成 theme_asset baseline 事件，并在 asset payload 缺失 theme_id/themeId 时补入父主题 theme_id；entity_id 使用 asset_hash/hash/entity_id。这样初次 Join Existing 会触发 apply_theme_asset 下载 /themes/assets/<hash> 到 app_config_dir/theme_library/<theme_id>/assets/<hash>.*。
2026-06-07 同步缺失修复：群聊用户消息和群聊 AI 回复在本地 append_single_message 成功后必须调用 enqueue_message_create；失败只 warn，不阻断聊天主流程，保持与单 Agent 路径一致。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 2026-06-08 修复 repairTopic 补发策略：Center /messages/check 明确返回消息已存在且 checksum 不冲突时，不再仅因为 local_index 缺失 enqueue message.create.repair；只有 Center 缺失，或 Center check 被跳过且本地索引缺失的保守兜底场景才入队。

repairTopic(runtime, options) 用于按 item_type/item_id/topic_id 扫描本地 history.json，对比 local_index、offline_queue 与 Center /messages/check；dryRun=true 仅报告，dryRun=false 通过 offlineQueue.enqueueMany 追加修复操作，不直接写 Center 数据库。后续增强已加入 Center /topics/check：当父 topic 缺失时会先 enqueue topic.upsert.repair，再 enqueue message.create.repair。
2026-06-08 stableFileReader 默认 stableDelayMs 已统一为 500ms，用于 watcher、scanner、repairTopic 等未显式传 stableDelayMs 的 readStableJson 调用，匹配最终同步修复方案参数。

../../VCPMobile/src/core/stores/syncSess.note: 2026-06-08 failed queue 刷新按钮 loading 修复：refreshFailedOperations(withBusy=true) 会设置 busyAction='refreshFailed' 并在 finally 清理；内部 refreshAll/runAction 仍可默认 withBusy=false 复用，避免嵌套刷新覆盖外层 busyAction。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 2026-06-08 使用说明已在“常用命令”补充桌面端 /repair/topic 通俗用法：说明 dryRun=true 先检查、dryRun=false 入队修复；参数 item_type/item_id/topic_id 可从 AppData/UserData/<item_id>/topics/<topic_id>/history.json 路径识别；修复只写 offline_queue.jsonl，不直接写中心数据库。

2026-06-08 P0/P1 主题资源修复：bootstrap baseline 的 theme_asset 只代表 Center 已有元数据，不代表二进制已上传。syncThemePackage 现在在 previousAsset.binary_uploaded !== true、uploaded !== true、bootstrap_baseline === true 或 relative_path 变化时强制 POST /themes/assets；上传成功后写入 binary_uploaded:true、bootstrap_baseline:false。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/dat.note: 2026-06-08 P0 主题资源补传止血：Center theme_assets 22 条 metadata 对应文件全缺失；从 G:\VCP\VCPChat\assets\wallpaper 按 SHA256 匹配复制到 DB storage_path 指定位置后 integrity 为 total=22, ok=22, missing_file=0。注意不能只按本地扩展名写目标路径，必须按 theme_assets.storage_path 写入，否则 code-dark/code-light/月影/春信 等 DB 记录扩展名与源文件名扩展名不一致时仍会 missing_file。
